resposta:
solution:
```
class Solution:
    def maximumOr(self, nums: List[int], k: int) -> int:
        nums.sort()
        for i in range(len(nums) - 1, -1, -1):
            while k > 0 and nums[i] < (1 << 30):
                nums[i] *= 2
                k -= 1
        res = 0
        for num in nums:
            res |= num
        return res
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n log n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: Sort the array in ascending order, then iterate from the end to the beginning, doubling the current number as many times as possible without exceeding the maximum possible value. Finally, calculate the bitwise OR of all numbers in the array.
